contract.blueprint: One open loft floor, split-level. TWO named zones: (1) SIGN-IN near the glass-door entrance; (2) SPEAKING ALCOVE on the LOWER ground. A permanent rectangular kitchen island sits between/beside them; a staircase leads to a raised area used only as open standing/lounge space.
contract.map: Entrance (glass doors, green EXIT) -> sign-in desk + AITX A-frame, with the dark 'ANTLER' wood wall and white AITX pull-up banner BEHIND the seated greeter (not in the greeter's forward view). Speaking alcove is lower-ground: brown leather loveseat in front of the ANTLER+AITX step-and-repeat and a wall screen + green-NVIDIA-logo monitor; rows of black + white chairs face it. Kitchen island along one side (food/coffee). Raised area via stairs = standing/lounge only.
contract.blocking: The speaker sits/stands on the LOWER ground on the leather loveseat by the step-and-repeat; the audience sits in rows facing them on the lower ground; networking happens standing around the kitchen island. NEVER a podium or stage on the raised upper platform.
contract.dressing: ANTLER: white capitals on the dark wood sign-in wall; coral-red on the alcove step-and-repeat. AITX: the LOGO (orange reaching-person mark + 'aitx'), never plain text; on the pull-up banner ('Building AI's future in Texas', QR, skyline), the A-frame, the step-and-repeat, lanyards/name tags ('aitx Guest'), the wall screen. NVIDIA: green logo on the monitor (the hackathon). Papel-picado banners overhead; warm-wood + polished-concrete floors; exposed industrial ceiling. NO 'Applied AI Society' / 'AAS'. NOTE: 'AI that works' is APIFY's slogan (Michael's employer), NOT AITX; never put it on AITX materials. The signin-2 A-frame currently shows it in error and should be reshot.

prose.lore: Antler VC's Austin venue, the home base for AITX events (monthly meetups, the NVIDIA hackathon). Comic-book register matching the character art.
prose.rules: Locked: turnaround + empty plates + layout/blocking spec present. Every render passes the real AITX logo in. Speaking on the lower ground only.
